red.name: Deploy Red
red.usage: Primary brand accent. Logo mark, CTAs, active states. Use sparingly — maximum 10% of any composition.

navy.name: Blue King
navy.usage: Primary text and dark backgrounds. Logo wordmark, body copy, dark sections.

blue.name: Baby Blue
blue.usage: Secondary accent. Data visualizations, supporting elements, secondary CTAs. Never as text on white.

white.name: White
white.usage: Logo reversed, text on dark backgrounds.

background.name: Off-white
background.usage: Default page background. Slightly warm to avoid clinical pure white.

surface.name: Surface white
surface.usage: Card surfaces, modals, elevated content areas.

text-primary.name: Text primary
text-primary.usage: Body copy, headings. Identical to Blue King.

text-secondary.name: Text secondary
text-secondary.usage: Supporting text, captions, metadata. Derived from Blue King at reduced lightness.

red-tint.name: Red tint
red-tint.usage: Hover backgrounds on red-adjacent elements. Alert/error surfaces.

navy-tint.name: Navy tint
navy-tint.usage: Code blocks, subtle backgrounds, inactive states.
